title: Use of amphotericin b in the treatment of coronavirus diseases
abstract: A use of Amphotericin B for the treatment or prevention of SARS-CoV-2 infection in a subject. Also disclosed are oral formulations comprising amphotericin B for such use.
claims: Claims 1. A use of Amphotericin B for preventing a SARS-CoV-2 infection in a subject. 2. A use of Amphotericin B for treating a SARS-CoV-2 infection in a subject. 3. A use of Amphotericin B for preventing replication of a SARS-CoV-2 virus in a mammalian cell. 4. A use of an oral formulation comprising Amphotericin B for preventing a SARS-CoV-2 infection in a subject. 5. A use of an oral formulation comprising Amphotericin B for treating a SARS-CoV-2 infection in a subject. 6. A use of an oral formulation comprising Amphotericin B for preventing replication of the SARS- CoV-2 virus in a mammalian cell. 24
